payload.answer: Graph memory systems must explicitly model relationships between entities and include provenance metadata to support update semantics and maintain audit trails.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entities match the described graph memory design principles.

memory_cards.statement: Graph memory systems enable agents to preserve relationships between knowledge entities, not just isolated facts.
Provenance tracking is essential for graph memory to maintain update semantics and auditability.

details: Durable memory committed for graph memory design principles.
Ambiguity preserved in 'update semantics' (temporal vs. logical interpretation).
